---
title: "Monoculture analysis"
output: html_notebook
---
# color selection for plots
```{r}
all_strains <- sort(unique(c(mono_24hr$strain)))
base_colors <- c(brewer.pal(12, "Paired"), brewer.pal(8, "Set2"))
get_palette <- colorRampPalette(base_colors)
my_colors <- setNames(get_palette(length(all_strains)), all_strains)
```
# Monogrowth line in different OD level
```{r}
mono_growth_long <- mono_df_all %>%
    select(
        strain, replicate, OD,
        logM0, logM12, logM24
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(
        cols = c(logM0, logM12, logM24),
        names_to = "time_label",
        values_to = "log_CFU"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        time_hr = case_when(
            time_label == "logM0" ~ 0,
            time_label == "logM12" ~ 12,
            time_label == "logM24" ~ 24
        )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(log_CFU))

ggplot(mono_growth_long,aes(x = time_hr, y = log_CFU, 
                            group = interaction(OD, replicate), color = OD)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.45) +
    geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
    stat_summary(
        aes(group = OD),
        fun = mean,
        geom = "line",
        linewidth = 1.1
    ) +
    stat_summary(
        aes(group = OD),
        fun = mean,
        geom = "point",
        size = 3
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ strain, scales = "fixed") +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0, 12, 24)
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
        title = "Monoculture growth assay",
        subtitle = "Growth curves under different initial OD conditions",
        x = "Time (hr)",
        y = "log CFU/ml",
        color = "Initial OD"
    )
```


## alpha_ii and r_i from monoculture (statistical fitting) (scaled by 1e9) 
\[alpha_{ii} = (\left(\frac{lnN_{i24}^m - lnN_{i0}^m}{24}\right)-r_{i}).\left(\frac{-1}{N_{i0}^m}\right)\]
```{r}
make_interval_df <- function(df, source_name, scale_factor = 1e9) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(source = source_name)
  if (!"OD" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df %>%
      mutate(OD = source_name)
  }
  for (col in c("M0", "M6", "M12", "M24")) {
    if (!col %in% names(df)) {
      df[[col]] <- NA_real_
    }
  }
  
  interval_df <- df %>%
    select(
      strain,replicate,OD,source,M0,M6,M12,M24
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(M0, M6, M12, M24),
      names_to = "time_label",
      values_to = "N"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      time_hr = as.numeric(str_remove(time_label, "M")),
      N = as.numeric(N)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(N), N > 0) %>%
    arrange(strain, OD, source, replicate, time_hr) %>%
     filter(time_hr %in% c(0, 24)) %>% #only take N0 to N24
    group_by(strain, OD, source, replicate) %>%
    mutate(
      N_start = N/scale_factor, #/scale_factor
      N_end = lead(N)/scale_factor, #/scale_factor
      t_start = time_hr,
      t_end = lead(time_hr),
      delta_t = t_end - t_start
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(!is.na(N_end), delta_t > 0) %>%
    mutate(
      interval = paste0(t_start, "-", t_end, "hr"),
      g = log(N_end / N_start) / delta_t,
      Nbar = (N_end+N_start)/2,
    )
  return(interval_df)
}

# 2. Build interval datasets
interval_OD_0_1 <- make_interval_df(
  mono_df_OD_0_1,
  source_name = "OD_0.1"
)

interval_OD_0_5 <- make_interval_df(
  mono_df_OD_0_5,
  source_name = "OD_0.5"
)

interval_OD_1 <- make_interval_df(
  mono_df,
  source_name = "OD_1"
)

interval_all_pooled <- bind_rows(
  interval_OD_0_1,
  interval_OD_0_5,
  interval_OD_1
)

estimate_alpha_ii_by_strain <- function(interval_df, density_var = "N_start") {
  formula_use <- as.formula(paste("g ~", density_var))
  alpha_result <- interval_df %>%
    group_by(strain) %>%
    filter(n() >= 3) %>%
    nest() %>%
    mutate(
      fit = map(data, ~ lm(formula_use, data = .x)),
      coef = map(fit, broom::tidy),
      model_info = map(fit, broom::glance)
    ) %>%
    select(strain, coef, model_info) %>%
    unnest(coef) %>%
    mutate(
      parameter = case_when(
        term == "(Intercept)" ~ "r_i",
        term == density_var ~ "alpha_ii",
        TRUE ~ term
      ),
      density_model = density_var
    ) %>%
    select(
      strain, density_model, parameter, estimate, std.error,
      statistic, p.value
    )
  
  return(alpha_result)
}
# 
alpha_ii_pooled_N_start <- estimate_alpha_ii_by_strain(
  interval_all_pooled,
  density_var = "N_start"
)

make_selflimit_table <- function(alpha_tbl) {
  alpha_tbl %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(
      strain, density_model, parameter,
      estimate, std.error, p.value
      ) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = parameter,
      values_from = c(estimate, std.error, p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      r_i = estimate_r_i,
      alpha_ii_signed = estimate_alpha_ii,
      r_i_SE = std.error_r_i,
      alpha_ii_SE = std.error_alpha_ii,
      r_i_p_value = p.value_r_i,
      alpha_ii_p_value = p.value_alpha_ii
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      self_limitation_strength = -alpha_ii_signed,
      
      alpha_ii_selflimit = ifelse(
        r_i > 0 & alpha_ii_signed < 0,
        -alpha_ii_signed / r_i,
        NA_real_
      )
    )
}

selflimit_pooled_N_start <- make_selflimit_table(alpha_ii_pooled_N_start)

alpha_ii_OD_all <- estimate_alpha_ii_by_strain(
  interval_all_pooled, density_var = "N_start"
)


alpha_selflimit_N0 <- alpha_ii_OD_all %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(
    strain, parameter, estimate,
    std.error, p.value
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = parameter,
    values_from = c(estimate, std.error, p.value)
  ) %>%
  rename(
    r_i = estimate_r_i,
    alpha_ii_signed = estimate_alpha_ii,
    r_i_SE = std.error_r_i,
    alpha_ii_signed_SE = std.error_alpha_ii,
    r_i_p_value = p.value_r_i,
    alpha_ii_p_value = p.value_alpha_ii
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # 只是把 signed alpha 轉成正值強度
    self_limitation_strength = -alpha_ii_signed,
    self_limitation_strength_SE = alpha_ii_signed_SE,
    
    # 真正對應 g = r_i * (1 - alpha_selflimit * N)
    alpha_ii_selflimit = ifelse(
      r_i > 0 & alpha_ii_signed < 0,
      -alpha_ii_signed / r_i,
      NA_real_
    ),
    
    # 簡化版 SE，忽略 r_i 和 alpha_ii 的 covariance
    alpha_ii_selflimit_SE_approx = ifelse(
      r_i > 0 & alpha_ii_signed < 0,
      sqrt(
        (alpha_ii_signed_SE / r_i)^2 +
          ((alpha_ii_signed * r_i_SE) / (r_i^2))^2
      ),
      NA_real_
    )
  )


r_i_OD_all_summary <- alpha_ii_OD_all %>%
  filter(parameter == "r_i") 


# ============================================================
# 4. Plot alpha_ii trend for OD all
# ============================================================

ggplot(interval_all_pooled, aes(x = N_start, y = g)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~ strain, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "All OD monoculture-derived alpha_ii",
    subtitle = "alpha_ii is estimated from g = r_i + alpha_ii_coefficient * N_0",
    x = "Strain density change, N_0 ",
    y = "Per-capita growth rate, log(N_24/N_0) / hour"
  )


# ============================================================
# 7. Plot alpha_ii estimates
# ============================================================

self_limitation_strength_plot <- alpha_selflimit_N0 %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = reorder(strain, self_limitation_strength),
      y = self_limitation_strength, color = strain
    )
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "red"
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = self_limitation_strength - self_limitation_strength_SE,
      ymax = self_limitation_strength + self_limitation_strength_SE
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
   scale_color_manual(values = my_colors) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Self-limitation strength alpha_ii",
    # subtitle = "expression(alpha[ii] == -alpha[ii]^ce)",
    x = "Strain",
    y = "alpha_ii" #self limitation strength
  )

print(self_limitation_strength_plot)

ggplot(r_i_OD_all_summary, aes(x = reorder(strain, estimate), y = estimate, color = strain)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = estimate - std.error,
      ymax = estimate + std.error
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Estimated r_i from monoculture data",
    x = "Strain",
    y = "r_i estimate"
  )

```
